description.ru: Vue host component that creates a NovaApp, mounts compiled Nova DSL from its default slot and exposes overlay slots.
description.en: Vue host component that creates a NovaApp, mounts compiled Nova DSL from its default slot and exposes overlay slots.

description.ru: Accessible canvas label and default DevTools label.
description.en: Accessible canvas label and default DevTools label.

description.ru: Ширина компонента.
description.en: Canvas stage width. Number values are treated as pixels.

description.ru: Высота компонента.
description.en: Canvas stage height. Number values are treated as pixels.

description.ru: Static path to a `.nova` entrypoint component. The Nova compiler turns it into a mounted `nova-template` marker.
description.en: Static path to a `.nova` entrypoint component. The Nova compiler turns it into a mounted `nova-template` marker.

description.ru: Plain props bridge forwarded to the mounted `.nova` entrypoint and updated without remounting.
description.en: Plain props bridge forwarded to the mounted `.nova` entrypoint and updated without remounting.

description.ru: Maximum device pixel ratio used by Nova canvas sizing.
description.en: Maximum device pixel ratio used by Nova canvas sizing.

description.ru: Name for the root Nova surface created by NovaCanvas.
description.en: Name for the root Nova surface created by NovaCanvas.

description.ru: Schema plugins registered before template mount, for example `registerNovaUIKit`.
description.en: Schema plugins registered before template mount, for example `registerNovaUIKit`.

description.ru: Additional NovaApp create options: renderer, scheduler, input, sound, theme and debug.
description.en: Additional NovaApp create options: renderer, scheduler, input, sound, theme and debug.

description.ru: Root padding forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.
description.en: Root padding forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.

description.ru: Фон компонента.
description.en: Root background forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.

description.ru: Описание обводки.
description.en: Root border forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.

description.ru: Root clip flag forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.
description.en: Root clip flag forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.

description.ru: Root component id for the implicit Root wrapper.
description.en: Root component id for the implicit Root wrapper.

description.ru: Root className forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper. Responsive tokens such as `hidden md:shown md:box` are valid w...
description.en: Root className forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper. Responsive tokens such as `hidden md:shown md:box` are valid when NovaCSS provides matching utilities/classes.

description.ru: NovaCSS stylesheet source or asset forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.
description.en: NovaCSS stylesheet source or asset forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.

description.ru: Enable/disable Nova DevTools registration or override DevTools id/label.
description.en: Enable/disable Nova DevTools registration or override DevTools id/label.

description.ru: Inline Nova DSL. The Nova Vite compiler rewrites this slot into `#nova` with a `nova-template` marker.
description.en: Inline Nova DSL. The Nova Vite compiler rewrites this slot into `#nova` with a `nova-template` marker.

description.ru: Compiled Nova template marker slot generated by the compiler.
description.en: Compiled Nova template marker slot generated by the compiler.

description.ru: Regular Vue overlay content rendered above the canvas stage.
description.en: Regular Vue overlay content rendered above the canvas stage.

description.ru: Internal marker consumed by NovaCanvas. Usually generated by the Nova Vite compiler.
description.en: Internal marker consumed by NovaCanvas. Usually generated by the Nova Vite compiler.

description.ru: Путь к внешнему Nova asset.
description.en: Path to a `.nova` source file.

description.ru: Compiled Nova component constructor.
description.en: Compiled Nova component constructor.

description.ru: Debug source path.
description.en: Debug source path.

description.ru: Debug identifier.
description.en: Debug identifier.

description.ru: Template options forwarded to the compiled component.
description.en: Template options forwarded to the compiled component.

description.ru: Template data forwarded to the compiled component.
description.en: Template data forwarded to the compiled component.
